lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਖੁ ਤੂੰ ਮੈ ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਵਨੁ ਭਤਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau rakh toon mai tujh bin kavan bhataar |3|
lines.english: As it pleases You, Lord, please save and protect me. Without You, O my Husband Lord, who else is there for me? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਘਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saach sehaj sobhaa ghanee har gun naam adhaar |
lines.english: Through truth and intuitive poise, great honor is obtained, with the Support of the Naam and the Glory of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖਰ ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਭੁਲੀਐ ਭੇਖੀ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: akhar parr parr bhuleeai bhekhee bahut abhimaan |
lines.english: Reading their books over and over again, people continue making mistakes; they are so proud of their religious robes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਤਾ ਕਿਆ ਕਰੇ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: teerath naataa kiaa kare man meh mail gumaan |
lines.english: But what is the use of bathing at sacred shrines of pilgrimage, when the filth of stubborn pride is within the mind?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਨਿ ਸਮਝਾਈਐ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਜਾ ਸੁਲਤਾਨੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur bin kin samajhaaeeai man raajaa sulataan |4|
lines.english: Other than the Guru, who can explain that within the mind is the Lord, the King, the Emperor? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਤੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: prem padaarath paaeeai guramukh tat veechaar |
lines.english: The Treasure of the Lord's Love is obtained by the Gurmukh, who contemplates the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਧਨ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saa dhan aap gavaaeaa gur kai sabad seegaar |
lines.english: The bride eradicates her selfishness, and adorns herself with the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਹੀ ਸੋ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: ghar hee so pir paaeaa gur kai het apaar |5|
lines.english: Within her own home, she finds her Husband, through infinite love for the Guru. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਖੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad man vasiaa haumai vichahu khoe |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad abides within the mind, and egotism is eliminated from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee sevaa chaakaree man niramal sukh hoe |
lines.english: Applying oneself to the service of the Guru, the mind is purified, and peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਲਾਭੁ ਸਦਾ ਮਨਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naam padaarath paaeaa laabh sadaa man hoe |6|
lines.english: The Treasure of the Naam is acquired, and the mind reaps the lasting profit. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਆਪਿ ਨ ਲਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: karam milai taa paaeeai aap na leaa jaae |
lines.english: If He grants His Grace, then we obtain it. We cannot find it by our own efforts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੁਲਣ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਅਭੁਲੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhulan andar sabh ko abhul guroo karataar |
lines.english: Everyone makes mistakes; only the Guru and the Creator are infallible.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਸਚੋ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sache setee ratiaa sacho palai paae |7|
lines.english: Attuned to Truth, you shall obtain the True One. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਗਿ ਰਹੁ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee charanee lag rahu vichahu aap gavaae |
lines.english: Remain attached to the Feet of the Guru, and eradicate selfishness from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਮੇਲੇ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥੮॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak saach na veesarai mele sabad apaar |8|12|
lines.english: O Nanak, do not forget the Truth; you shall receive the Infinite Word of the Shabad. ||8||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਨੁ ਸਮਝਾਇਆ ਲਾਗਾ ਤਿਸੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramat man samajhaaeaa laagaa tisai piaar |
lines.english: One who instructs his mind with the Guru's Teachings comes to embrace love for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਣੀ ਸੁਤ ਬੰਧਪ ਘਰ ਨਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa maaeaa mohanee sut bandhap ghar naar |
lines.english: The enticing desire for Maya leads people to become emotionally attached to their children, relatives, households and spouses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਿ ਜੋਬਨਿ ਜਗੁ ਠਗਿਆ ਲਬਿ ਲੋਭਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dhan joban jag tthagiaa lab lobh ahankaar |
lines.english: The world is deceived and plundered by riches, youth, greed and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮਾ ਮੈ ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere preetamaa mai tujh bin avar na koe |
lines.english: O my Beloved, I have no one except You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਠਗਉਲੀ ਹਉ ਮੁਈ ਸਾ ਵਰਤੈ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: moh tthgaulee hau muee saa varatai sansaar |1|
lines.english: The drug of emotional attachment has destroyed me, as it has destroyed the whole world. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਭਾਵਈ ਤੂੰ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mai tujh bin avar na bhaavee toon bhaaveh sukh hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without You, nothing else pleases me. Loving You, I am at peace. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: naam saalaahee rang siau gur kai sabad santokh |
lines.english: I sing the Praises of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, with love; I am content with the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦੀਸੈ ਸੋ ਚਲਸੀ ਕੂੜਾ ਮੋਹੁ ਨ ਵੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo deesai so chalasee koorraa mohu na vekh |
lines.english: Whatever is seen shall pass away. So do not be attached to this false show.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਟ ਵਟਾਊ ਆਇਆ ਨਿਤ ਚਲਦਾ ਸਾਥੁ ਦੇਖੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vaatt vattaaoo aaeaa nit chaladaa saath dekh |2|
lines.english: Like a traveller in his travels, you have come. Behold the caravan leaving each day. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣਿ ਆਖਹਿ ਕੇਤੜੇ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aakhan aakheh ketarre gur bin boojh na hoe |
lines.english: Many preach sermons, but without the Guru, understanding is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਚਿ ਰਪੈ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam vaddaaee je milai sach rapai pat hoe |
lines.english: If someone receives the Glory of the Naam, he is attuned to truth and blessed with honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਭਲੇ ਖੋਟਾ ਖਰਾ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaaveh se bhale khottaa kharaa na koe |3|
lines.english: Those who are pleasing to You are good; no one is counterfeit or genuine. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਟ ਧਾਤੁ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹ ਕੀ ਘੜੀਐ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਿਗਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: asatt dhaat paatisaah kee gharreeai sabad vigaas |
lines.english: The eight metals of the King are made into coins by the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਖੋਟੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur saranaaee chhutteeai manamukh khottee raas |
lines.english: In the Guru's Sanctuary we are saved. The assets of the self-willed manmukhs are false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪਰਖੇ ਪਾਰਖੂ ਪਵੈ ਖਜਾਨੈ ਰਾਸਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aape parakhe paarakhoo pavai khajaanai raas |4|
lines.english: The Assayer Himself assays them, and He places the genuine ones in His Treasury. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਸਭ ਡਿਠੀ ਠੋਕਿ ਵਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: teree keemat naa pavai sabh dditthee tthok vajaae |
lines.english: Your Value cannot be appraised; I have seen and tested everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਤੂੰ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਹੋਰੁ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: guramat toon saalaahanaa hor keemat kehan na jaae |5|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, I praise You; otherwise, I cannot describe Your Value. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਣੈ ਹਾਥ ਨ ਲਭਈ ਸਚਿ ਟਿਕੈ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kahanai haath na labhee sach ttikai pat paae |
lines.english: By speaking, His Depth cannot be found. Abiding in truth, honor is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਤਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਭਾਵਈ ਤਿਤੁ ਤਨਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਾਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: jit tan naam na bhaavee tith tan haumai vaad |
lines.english: That body which does not appreciate the Naam-that body is infested with egotism and conflict.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਦੂਜਾ ਸਾਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur bin giaan na paaeeai bikhiaa doojaa saad |
lines.english: Without the Guru, spiritual wisdom is not obtained; other tastes are poison.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਮਾਇਆ ਫੀਕਾ ਸਾਦੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bin gun kaam na aavee maaeaa feekaa saad |6|
lines.english: Without virtue, nothing is of any use. The taste of Maya is bland and insipid. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਜੰਮਿਆ ਆਸਾ ਰਸ ਕਸ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa andar jamiaa aasaa ras kas khaae |
lines.english: Through desire, people are cast into the womb and reborn. Through desire, they taste the sweet and sour flavors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਬੰਧਿ ਚਲਾਈਐ ਮੁਹੇ ਮੁਹਿ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa bandh chalaaeeai muhe muhi chottaa khaae |
lines.english: Bound by desire, they are led on, beaten and struck on their faces and mouths.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣਿ ਬਧਾ ਮਾਰੀਐ ਛੂਟੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: avagan badhaa maareeai chhoottai guramat naae |7|
lines.english: Bound and gagged and assaulted by evil, they are released only through the Name, through the Guru's Teachings. ||7||
